expressivity.justification: exact softmax retrieval over the full context; the recall reference.

hardware.justification: pure dense matmul (Gate-3 friendly) but O(T^2) compute/memory in T.

trainability.justification: standard residual+norm transformer block trains to depth routinely.

name: attention
reason: reference baseline; gauntlet verdict: aces-mqar (recall holds across K)

expressivity.justification: fixed-size state binds only ~n_heads*d_key associations; recall saturates as K grows.

hardware.justification: reduces to a parallel associative scan / matmul; Gate-3 friendly at scale.

scaling.justification: scales smoothly on local tasks but the recall ceiling does not move with width alone.

trainability.justification: linear recurrence trains stably; bounded, well-conditioned gradients.

name: ssm
reason: reference baseline; gauntlet verdict: recall-limited (MQAR degrades as K grows)
